meta.tagline: Building AI systems that solve real-world problems at scale

hero.name: Deekshana C S
hero.headline: AI Engineer | ML Researcher | Problem Solver
hero.summary: I build AI-powered systems that create real-world impact across agriculture, healthcare, and sustainability domains.

about.shortBio: Computer Science Engineering student specializing in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning with strong expertise in Deep Learning, NLP, and Computer Vision.
about.longBio: I am passionate about building AI-driven solutions that solve real-world challenges. My work spans across agriculture, healthcare, and environmental sustainability, where I focus on developing scalable, impactful systems. From designing crop prediction models to deploying real-time monitoring systems, I aim to combine research and engineering to create meaningful innovation. I actively work with Generative AI, cloud platforms, and real-time data systems to push the boundaries of applied AI.
about.mission: To build intelligent systems that create sustainable and scalable impact for society.

Built scalable ML pipeline for real-time network traffic analysis
